response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or Python — all central to this Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK) but not deeply showcased across GCP/Azure, and customer-facing technical discovery leadership is not evident.
strengths: 10+ years shipping production software across full stack with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq
Track record of technical leadership, mentoring, workshops, and OSS project ownership
concerns: No clear evidence of production RAG, vector DB, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Python is absent from the listed skills despite being a primary required language
No demonstrated customer-facing discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience
